events.title: Radiant Skin at Any Age: Anti-Aging Skincare Webinar
events.description: Join our board-certified dermatologist for a free, 75-minute online webinar covering the essentials of anti-aging skincare, including retinoids, sunscreen, and in-clinic treatments like microneedling and RF tightening. Live Q&A included.

events.title: Injectables 101: Botox & Filler Info Night
events.description: An in-person educational evening at our Downtown Skin & Laser Clinic. Learn how Botox and dermal fillers work, see live demonstrations, and enjoy exclusive same-night booking incentives.

events.title: Spring Skin Reset: Brightening & Pigment Solutions
events.description: A hybrid event hosted at our Uptown Aesthetics Clinic with live streaming available. We cover pigment-safe brightening routines, chemical peels, and vitamin C serums, plus treatment demos.

events.title: Laser Hair Removal 101: What to Expect
events.description: Learn how laser hair removal works, which areas can be treated, and how to prepare for your first session. Hosted in person at our Eastside Dermatology & Laser Center.

membership_plans.name: Glow Maintenance Skincare Membership
membership_plans.description: A flexible monthly skincare membership designed for ongoing glow maintenance. Includes one clinical facial each month, member pricing on add-ons, and exclusive event invitations.

membership_plans.name: Injectables Savings Plan
membership_plans.description: Ideal for guests who receive Botox or filler several times per year. Enjoy banked credits, lower per-unit Botox pricing, and discounts on dermal fillers.
benefits: Banked monthly credits usable toward injectables

membership_plans.name: Smooth Legs Laser Hair Removal Membership
membership_plans.description: Spread out the cost of full legs laser hair removal over easy monthly payments with built-in savings and touch-up discounts.

membership_plans.name: Elite Skin VIP Membership
membership_plans.description: Our most comprehensive skincare membership with alternating facials and peels, VIP pricing on treatments, and complimentary event access.
benefits: Alternating advanced facial or peel each month
15% off body contouring and laser services
Complimentary access to VIP events & webinars

products.name: Radiance C 15% Vitamin C Serum
products.description: A stabilized 15% L-ascorbic acid vitamin C serum with ferulic acid and vitamin E to brighten dull skin, reduce fine lines, and protect against environmental damage.
products.ingredients: Water, L-Ascorbic Acid (15%), Tocopherol (Vitamin E), Ferulic Acid, Hyaluronic Acid, Glycerin.
products.usage_instructions: Apply 4–5 drops to clean, dry skin each morning before moisturizer and sunscreen. Avoid eye area.

products.name: Advanced C + Firming Serum
products.description: A powerful vitamin C and peptide serum that targets fine lines, uneven tone, and early signs of aging while supporting collagen production.
products.ingredients: Ascorbyl Glucoside (Vitamin C), Peptides, Niacinamide, Hyaluronic Acid, Panthenol.
products.usage_instructions: Use 1–2 pumps on face and neck every morning after cleansing. Follow with moisturizer and SPF.

products.name: Hyaluronic Hydration Serum
products.description: A lightweight hyaluronic acid serum that delivers multi-level hydration and plumps the appearance of fine lines.
products.ingredients: Multi-weight Hyaluronic Acid, Glycerin, Panthenol, Aloe Vera.
products.usage_instructions: Apply to damp skin morning and night before moisturizer.

products.name: Daily Defense SPF 50+ Sunscreen
products.description: A lightweight, broad-spectrum SPF 50+ sunscreen with niacinamide and antioxidants. Non-greasy and suitable for all skin types.
products.ingredients: Zinc Oxide 12%, Octocrylene 7%, Niacinamide, Vitamin E, Green Tea Extract.
products.usage_instructions: Apply generously to face and exposed skin as the last step of your morning routine. Reapply every 2 hours when outdoors.

products.name: Ultra-Light Tinted SPF 50 Fluid
products.description: A sheer, tinted SPF 50 mineral fluid that blends easily and leaves a natural, non-chalky finish.
products.ingredients: Zinc Oxide 18%, Titanium Dioxide 4%, Iron Oxides, Squalane.
products.usage_instructions: Shake well. Apply liberally to face and neck 15 minutes before sun exposure.

products.name: Mineral Shield SPF 30
products.description: A gentle, fragrance-free mineral SPF 30 ideal for sensitive and post-procedure skin.
products.usage_instructions: Apply as the final step of your morning routine, avoiding the eye area.

products.name: Gentle Gel Cleanser
products.description: A sulfate-free gel cleanser that removes makeup and impurities without stripping the skin.
products.ingredients: Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Glycerin, Aloe Vera, Allantoin.
products.usage_instructions: Massage onto damp skin for 30–60 seconds, then rinse thoroughly.

products.name: Ceramide Barrier Repair Cream
products.description: A rich yet fast-absorbing cream with ceramides and cholesterol to strengthen the skin barrier and lock in moisture.
products.ingredients: Ceramides, Cholesterol, Fatty Acids, Niacinamide, Shea Butter.
products.usage_instructions: Apply a pea-sized amount to face and neck morning and evening as needed.

products.name: Overnight AHA Resurfacing Mask
products.description: A leave-on overnight treatment with glycolic and lactic acids to smooth texture and enhance radiance.
products.ingredients: Glycolic Acid 7%, Lactic Acid 3%, Aloe Vera, Panthenol.
products.usage_instructions: Use 1–2 nights per week. Apply a thin layer to clean skin, avoid eye area, and rinse in the morning.

products.name: Rose Quartz Facial Roller
products.description: A dual-ended rose quartz facial roller to enhance product absorption and promote a relaxing facial massage.
products.usage_instructions: Use gentle upward strokes on the face after applying serum or oil.

products.name: Digital Clinic Gift Card (Custom Amount)
products.description: A versatile digital gift card redeemable for any treatment or skincare product at our clinics or online shop. Choose your own amount and favorite design.
products.usage_instructions: Select an amount, choose an occasion design, and enter recipient details. The digital gift card will be emailed to the recipient and can be redeemed online or in-clinic.

products.name: Digital Clinic Gift Card - $200
products.description: A $200 digital gift card perfect for facials, peels, or skincare product hauls.
products.usage_instructions: Add to cart, enter recipient information at checkout, and choose email delivery.

providers.bio: Dr. Park is a board-certified dermatologist specializing in acne, cosmetic injectables, and laser procedures. She focuses on creating subtle, natural-looking results with personalized treatment plans.
Dr. Cho is a medical and cosmetic dermatologist with a focus on acne, rosacea, and non-surgical rejuvenation using injectables and energy-based devices.
Sofia is a certified physician assistant with extensive experience managing acne and other inflammatory skin conditions for teens and adults.
Lena is an experienced cosmetic nurse injector known for her gentle touch and artistry with Botox and dermal fillers.
Maya is a master esthetician providing advanced facials, peels, and body contouring treatments with a results-driven yet relaxing approach.

treatments.name: Botox for Wrinkles
treatments.short_description: Botox injections to soften expression lines on the forehead, crow’s feet, and frown lines.
treatments.long_description: Botox is an FDA-approved neuromodulator used to temporarily relax overactive facial muscles that cause dynamic wrinkles. Treatment typically takes 15–20 minutes with minimal downtime and results that appear within 3–7 days.

treatments.name: RF Skin Tightening – Face & Neck
treatments.short_description: Non-surgical radiofrequency skin tightening for laxity and fine lines on the face and neck.
treatments.long_description: This treatment uses controlled radiofrequency energy to gently heat the dermis, stimulating collagen production and improving the appearance of fine lines, mild sagging, and texture on the face and neck. Best performed in a series of 3–6 sessions.

treatments.name: Non-Surgical Body Contouring – Abdomen
treatments.short_description: Targeted body-contouring treatment to reduce stubborn fat and smooth the abdomen area.
treatments.long_description: This non-invasive body-contouring treatment focuses on the abdomen and stomach area to reduce stubborn fat pockets and improve overall contour. Typically performed as a package of 3–6 sessions for optimal results.

treatments.name: Laser Hair Removal – Full Legs + Bikini Package
treatments.short_description: Comprehensive laser hair removal package for full legs and bikini area.
treatments.long_description: Our Full Legs + Bikini laser hair removal package targets both the full legs and bikini area for long-lasting hair reduction. This combination package is typically performed over 6–8 sessions spaced 4–8 weeks apart.

treatments.name: New Patient Acne Consultation
treatments.short_description: Comprehensive dermatology consultation for new acne patients.
treatments.long_description: During this 30–40 minute visit, your dermatologist will evaluate your acne type, triggers, and skin history, then design a customized treatment plan that may include prescription medications, in-clinic treatments, and skincare recommendations.

treatments.name: Clarifying Acne Facial
treatments.short_description: A deep-cleansing facial with extractions and soothing mask for congested, breakout-prone skin.
treatments.long_description: Designed for congested and acne-prone skin, this clarifying facial includes a double cleanse, exfoliation, thorough extractions, high-frequency treatment, and a calming mask to reduce redness.

treatments.name: Microneedling – Face
treatments.short_description: Collagen-inducing microneedling treatment for texture, fine lines, and mild acne scarring.
treatments.long_description: Microneedling creates controlled micro-injuries in the skin to stimulate collagen and elastin, improving the appearance of fine lines, pores, and mild acne scarring. Best performed in a series of 3–4 sessions.

treatments.name: Dermaplaning Add-On
treatments.short_description: A manual exfoliation add-on to remove peach fuzz and enhance product absorption.
treatments.long_description: Dermaplaning uses a sterile blade to gently remove vellus hair and surface dead skin cells, leaving skin smooth and makeup-ready. Commonly added to facials and peels.

treatments.name: Laser Hair Removal – Underarms
treatments.short_description: Quick laser hair removal treatment for smooth, stubble-free underarms.
treatments.long_description: Underarm laser hair removal is one of the fastest and most popular areas to treat, typically requiring 6–8 sessions for long-term hair reduction.

treatments.name: Body Skin Tightening – Thighs
treatments.short_description: Radiofrequency-based skin tightening for laxity and crepiness on the thighs.
treatments.long_description: This treatment uses radiofrequency energy to improve the appearance of lax or crepey skin on the front or back of the thighs. Often combined with body-contouring procedures for enhanced results.

treatments.name: Level 2 Brightening Chemical Peel
treatments.short_description: Medium-strength peel to address discoloration, sun damage, and fine lines.
treatments.long_description: A layered chemical peel utilizing a blend of acids to fade hyperpigmentation, smooth fine lines, and improve overall radiance. Best performed in a series of 3 treatments.

packages.name: Laser Hair Removal  Full Legs + Bikini Value (6 Sessions)
packages.description: Best-value laser hair removal package covering both full legs and bikini. Ideal for those starting their first series with consistent scheduling.

packages.name: Laser Hair Removal  Full Legs + Bikini + Touch-Up (8 Sessions)
packages.description: Extended full legs and bikini laser hair removal package with two built-in touch-up sessions for more complete long-term reduction.

packages.name: Laser Hair Removal  Full Legs + Bikini Premium (6 Sessions)
packages.description: Premium laser hair removal package including full legs, bikini, and complimentary underarm treatments for each visit.

packages.name: Laser Hair Removal  Full Legs (6 Sessions)
packages.description: Focused full legs laser hair removal series of 6 sessions for long-lasting smoothness from thigh to ankle.

packages.name: Laser Hair Removal  Bikini (6 Sessions)
packages.description: Bikini-only laser hair removal package for reduced ingrown hairs and smoother skin in the bikini area.

packages.name: Laser Hair Removal  Underarms (6 Sessions)
packages.description: Underarm laser hair removal package of 6 quick sessions for a stubble-free underarm area.

packages.name: Non-Surgical Body Contouring  Abdomen (4 Sessions)
packages.description: A series of 4 non-surgical body-contouring sessions focused on the abdomen and stomach to reduce stubborn fat pockets and refine waistline contours.

packages.name: Microneedling  Face Series (3 Sessions)
packages.description: A corrective microneedling series of 3 sessions for the face, designed to address texture, fine lines, and mild acne scarring at a packaged rate.

packages.name: Level 2 Brightening Peel Series (3 Sessions)
packages.description: A series of three Level 2 brightening chemical peels spaced 416 weeks apart to improve discoloration, sun damage, and fine lines.

packages.name: Botox 3-Area Refresh Package
packages.description: Discounted Botox package covering up to three facial areas (frown lines, forehead, crows feet) in a single visit.

appointments.visit_reason: Weekday evening Botox consultation for forehead and crow’s feet
appointments.notes: First-time Botox patient. Prefers subtle, natural results.

appointments.visit_reason: Consultation about Full Legs + Bikini laser hair removal package options
appointments.notes: Interested in most affordable Full Legs + Bikini package under $300 per session.

appointments.visit_reason: New patient acne consultation with dermatologist
appointments.notes: Struggling with hormonal jawline acne; has tried over-the-counter products.

appointments.visit_reason: Virtual acne consultation and skincare routine review
appointments.notes: Prefers telehealth. Please send video visit instructions via email.
